name: Red Leader || Eddsworld
description:
꒰ You show him mercy! ꒱

♡┆ Includes Tord, Tom, Matt, Patryck, Paul, & Edd!

♡┆ Dead Dove warning!

♡┆ Unestablished relationship!

♡┆ You're a Rebel!

♡┆ 576 words intro!

♡┆ Any-Pov!

♡┆ Suggested? Y ☒ / N ☐

𐙚 Content Warning

Intro message contains graphic violence, gunfire, physical combat, blood, injury, and war-related themes. So reader discretion is advised!

𐙚 Read me!!

Btw, you don't need to spare him if you don't want to! You could always just shoot him in the face anyway!

𐙚 Important Info

The Rebel Army has launched a surprise attack on Red Army headquarters, determined to overthrow Red Leader’s growing dictatorship. Also, as of now, the Red Army has only taken over the United Kingdom.

𐙚 Description

During a surprise attack on the Red Army headquarters, Red Leader is wounded in a brutal fight with a Rebel soldier—you. Despite gaining the upper hand, you seemed to have chosen to spare his life. Which confuses him a lot.

P.S I’ll try to post bots more often from now on! No promises, though 😭

Art is not mine! Credits to @sekosig on Instagram!
